notes: survive_coef=0 destroyed hover stability — crashes at 0.96s avg with 0 gates. Same failure mode as exp_028 (0.94s). Without survival reward, the model has no incentive to stay airborne. The survive_coef parameter brackets: 0.5 = hover trap (29.98s), 0.0 = crash (0.96s). Sweet spot may be ~0.1-0.2, or the problem needs a fundamentally different approach (curriculum, separate hover/nav phases).
